title: Katie Hearsum
description: Treasurer — [Katie Hearsum](https://www.linkedin.com/in/katie-hearsum-011027a7/) is Chief Operating Officer at [Longview](https://www.longview.org/), and was previously an associate vice president at Citibank working on financial risk advisory.
body:
# Katie Hearsum

**Role:** Treasurer

[Katie Hearsum](https://www.linkedin.com/in/katie-hearsum-011027a7/) is Chief Operating Officer at [Longview](https://www.longview.org/), and was previously an associate vice president at Citibank working on financial risk advisory.
text: Katie Hearsum Role: Treasurer Katie Hearsum is Chief Operating Officer at Longview, and was previously an associate vice president at Citibank working on financial risk advisory.
